'''Garsala''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] ravaged by [[Volcano/Legends|volcanoes]], and was the fifth [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the [[Gorsh system/Legends|Gorsh system]]. It had two [[Moon/Legends|moons]].

{{Planet-stub}}
